title: KSwitch Project Manifest
description: Schema for kswitch.json — the KSwitch.ai project manifest file. Commit this to your repo root to declare your agent, MCP servers, and governance settings.

enforcement.description: Enforcement mode for this project. 'shadow' observes without blocking, 'enforce' actively blocks policy violations, 'disabled' turns off enforcement.

control_plane.description: Override URL for the KSwitch control plane API (overrides KSWITCH_API_URL env var). Leave blank to use the env var or default.

agent.description: Descriptor for the AI agent that owns this project.

id.description: Unique kebab-case identifier for this agent. Must match [a-z0-9][a-z0-9-]{2,63} — lowercase letters, digits, and hyphens only; no underscores; no uppercase; length 3-64.

display_name.description: Human-readable display name for the agent.

risk_tier.description: Risk tier classification. tier_1=critical, tier_2=high, tier_3=standard (default), tier_4=low.

trust_domain.description: SPIFFE trust domain for this agent (e.g. 'bank.internal'). Used for workload identity.

description.description: Free-text description of what this agent does.

owning_division.description: The business division or team that owns and is responsible for this agent.

contact_email.description: Contact email address for the team responsible for this agent.

mcps.description: List of MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers this project depends on.

McpServer.description: Descriptor for a single MCP server.

id.description: Unique kebab-case identifier for this MCP server.

url.description: URL for an HTTP(S) MCP server. Provide either 'url' (HTTP) or 'command' (stdio), not both.

command.description: Executable path for a stdio MCP server. Provide either 'url' (HTTP) or 'command' (stdio), not both.

args.description: Arguments passed to the stdio MCP server command. Only relevant when 'command' is set.
